isi.lyrics:
Lyric Boran - Moodset

Romanization

joyonghi beonjin
natseon gonggiga nal seuchyeogado joa um
iksukhan mameul beoseonan dwie meonjeo
saeroi breathe again (again)

malhaji anado
geunyang noeumyeon dwae

I’m fine, I’m flow
idaero heulleogagon hae
jogeum natseon gose deureogado ije gwaenchana

sink in deep
fall in the sound
iksukhan sigan wie
I’m moodset

neurige georeotdeon goseul chaja
gamanhi seumin janjanhan onggireul ttaraseo

(moving through the night)

malhaji anado
geunyang noeumyeon dwae

I’m fine, I’m flow
idaero heulleogagon hae
jogeum natseon gose deureogado ije gwaenchana

sink in deep
fall in the sound
iksukhan sigan wie
I’m moodset

jamsi meomchun i sunggan neukkimdaero
modeun ge cheoncheonhi heulleogadorok
I fade in silence
I’m still here tonight

I’m fine, I’m flow
idaero heulleogagon hae
jogeum natseon gose deureogado ije gwaenchana

sink in deep
fall in the sound
iksukhan sigan wie
I’m moodset



Hangeul

조용히 번진
낯선 공기가 날 스쳐가도 좋아 um
익숙한 맘을 벗어난 뒤에 먼저
새로이 breathe again (again)

말하지 않아도
그냥 놓으면 돼

I’m fine, I’m flow
이대로 흘러가곤 해
조금 낯선 곳에 들어가도 이제 괜찮아

sink in deep
fall in the sound
익숙한 시간 위에
I’m moodset

느리게 걸었던 곳을 찾아
가만히 스민 잔잔한 온기를 따라서

(moving through the night)

말하지 않아도
그냥 놓으면 돼

I’m fine, I’m flow
이대로 흘러가곤 해
조금 낯선 곳에 들어가도 이제 괜찮아

sink in deep
fall in the sound
익숙한 시간 위에
I’m moodset

잠시 멈춘 이 순간 느낌대로
모든 게 천천히 흘러가도록
I fade in silence
I’m still here tonight

I’m fine, I’m flow
이대로 흘러가곤 해
조금 낯선 곳에 들어가도 이제 괜찮아

sink in deep
fall in the sound
익숙한 시간 위에
I’m moodset

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Heiden - Home

Romanization

when you need a hand
ill be the one to reach
if that's alright with you
i won't hesitate

when you need a space
to let your mind walk in peace
just come in to my arms
it's always open wide and so

you can call me home
a sweet home
i know i don't have it all to give
i'm still your home

and when you're feeling scared
but you can't find somebody around you
i'll bring the light for you
through the deepest dark

you can call me home
a sweet home
i know i don't have it all to give
i'm still your home

i'll never change
i'll just stay the same
i'll leave the light on
so that you don't lose your way
and like i've always said

you can call me home

like i told you bout thousand times
it's not as much as you hoped for you hoped for
i'm still your home

you can call me home
a sweet home
i know it's not what you had in mind
i'm still your home

Hangeul

when you need a hand
ill be the one to reach
if that's alright with you
i won't hesitate

when you need a space
to let your mind walk in peace
just come in to my arms
it's always open wide and so

you can call me home
a sweet home
i know i don't have it all to give
i'm still your home

and when you're feeling scared
but you can't find somebody around you
i'll bring the light for you
through the deepest dark

you can call me home
a sweet home
i know i don't have it all to give
i'm still your home

i'll never change
i'll just stay the same
i'll leave the light on
so that you don't lose your way
and like i've always said

you can call me home

like i told you bout thousand times
it's not as much as you hoped for you hoped for
i'm still your home

you can call me home
a sweet home
i know it's not what you had in mind
i'm still your home

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Heiden - Becoming Grown

Romanization

i used to think i'd change the world
just had to dream and say the words
but now i know that's not my role
i’m learning just to keep my soul

i don’t need to win or chase
but i need a place to stand

i’m not the one they talk about
i’m not the loudest in the crowd
i'm okay not to be special
but i’m learning how to love me more

no need to shine or prove my name
just breathing slow is not the same
i'm okay not to be special
but i'm learning how to love me more

i used to love the louder cheers
thought being seen would drown my fears
but now i live in quieter ways
and find some peace in slower days

my heart’s not loud but it’s still real
and quiet things can help me heal

i’m not the one they talk about
i’m not the loudest in the crowd
i'm okay not to be special
but i’m learning how to love me more

no need to shine or prove my name
just breathing slow is not the same
i'm not okay not to be special
but i'm learning how to love me more

i know i won't be right for all
and maybe that's how it's supposed to be
but every day i see it clear
i’m still someone i hold dear

Hangeul

i used to think i'd change the world
just had to dream and say the words
but now i know that's not my role
i’m learning just to keep my soul

i don’t need to win or chase
but i need a place to stand

i’m not the one they talk about
i’m not the loudest in the crowd
i'm okay not to be special
but i’m learning how to love me more

no need to shine or prove my name
just breathing slow is not the same
i'm okay not to be special
but i'm learning how to love me more

i used to love the louder cheers
thought being seen would drown my fears
but now i live in quieter ways
and find some peace in slower days

my heart’s not loud but it’s still real
and quiet things can help me heal

i’m not the one they talk about
i’m not the loudest in the crowd
i'm okay not to be special
but i’m learning how to love me more

no need to shine or prove my name
just breathing slow is not the same
i'm not okay not to be special
but i'm learning how to love me more

i know i won't be right for all
and maybe that's how it's supposed to be
but every day i see it clear
i’m still someone i hold dear

isi.lyrics:
Lyric NEONTHEKIDS - 육하원칙 (5W1H) (Feat. Bebelune)

Romanization

gudi seolmyeongi piryo eopseotji
neoramyeon nan iyu eopsi

maeume daegareul baran sunggane na
honja machimpyoreul jjigeotji

naneun tto wae
gidarigiman hae

neoui geu jallan malgwa geu pyojeonge
maebeon gyeou chatneun daedap

nado moreugesseo seolmyeongi andwae
piryo eopseotji neoege iyu ttawin

gipeo jigiman hal jul aratdeon uri
han sunggane amuil eopdeon ge

nado moreugesseo seolmyeongi andwae
eotteoge nollijeogil su itgesseo

geureon nawa dareuge neon yalmipge
jalman malhaji yukhawonchige matge

nega eomneun haru
ijen iksukhaejyeo
amureon mal eopsi urin
siganui kkeute

gyeote isseodo neon
yeope eomneun geotcheoreom
We tried everything but we fall
We lost

naneun tto wae
gidarigiman hae

neoui geu jallan malgwa geu pyojeonge
maebeon gyeou chatneun daedap

nado moreugesseo seolmyeongi andwae
piryo eopseotji neoege iyu ttawin

gipeo jigiman hal jul aratdeon uri
han sunggane amuil eopdeon ge

nado moreugesseo seolmyeongi andwae
eotteoge nollijeogil su itgesseo

geureon nawa dareuge neon yalmipge
jalman malhaji yukhawonchige matge

hangsang nega jeongdabigo nan
ne mari beobirado doeneun deusi Why
beoseonal suga eopseo
arasseuni geuman meomchwo

nado moreugesseo seolmyeongi andwae
piryo eopseotji neoege iyu ttawin

gipeo jigiman hal jul aratdeon uri
han sunggane amuil eopdeon ge

nado moreugesseo seolmyeongi andwae
eotteoge nollijeogil su itgesseo

geureon nawa dareuge neon yalmipge
jalman malhaji yukhawonchige matge

Hangeul

굳이 설명이 필요 없었지
너라면 난 이유 없이

마음에 대가를 바란 순간에 나
혼자 마침표를 찍었지

나는 또 왜
기다리기만 해

너의 그 잘난 말과 그 표정에
매번 겨우 찾는 대답

나도 모르겠어 설명이 안돼
필요 없었지 너에게 이유 따윈

깊어 지기만 할 줄 알았던 우리
한 순간에 아무일 없던 게

나도 모르겠어 설명이 안돼
어떻게 논리적일 수 있겠어

그런 나와 다르게 넌 얄밉게
잘만 말하지 육하원칙에 맞게

네가 없는 하루
이젠 익숙해져
아무런 말 없이 우린
시간의 끝에

곁에 있어도 넌
옆에 없는 것처럼
We tried everything but we fall
We lost

나는 또 왜
기다리기만 해

너의 그 잘난 말과 그 표정에
매번 겨우 찾는 대답

나도 모르겠어 설명이 안돼
필요 없었지 너에게 이유 따윈

깊어 지기만 할 줄 알았던 우리
한 순간에 아무일 없던 게

나도 모르겠어 설명이 안돼
어떻게 논리적일 수 있겠어

그런 나와 다르게 넌 얄밉게
잘만 말하지 육하원칙에 맞게

항상 네가 정답이고 난
네 말이 법이라도 되는 듯이 Why
벗어날 수가 없어
알았으니 그만 멈춰

나도 모르겠어 설명이 안돼
필요 없었지 너에게 이유 따윈
